tasks.subject: Task 0: Resource Prices & Consumption Engine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the pure-function modules for resource pricing, consumption calculation, and storm protection.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/resource-prices.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/consumption.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/__tests__/consumption.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] getPrice returns correct prices
- [ ] calculateConsumption returns correct values for all 8 scenarios
- [ ] checkProtection priority order correct
- [ ] resolveLost returns 3-day doubled costs
- [ ] Friendly Cove zeroes water
- [ ] Home Port zeroes all consumption
- [ ] All tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/lib/__tests__/consumption.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/resource-prices.ts", "src/lib/consumption.ts", "src/lib/__tests__/consumption.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/lib/__tests__/consumption.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getPrice returns correct prices", "calculateConsumption returns correct values for all 8 scenarios", "checkProtection priority order correct", "resolveLost returns 3-day doubled costs", "Friendly Cove zeroes water", "Home Port zeroes all consumption", "All tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Purchase Resources Server Logic & API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement server-side purchase logic with full validation and API route.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/lib/game-actions.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/game/purchase/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] purchaseResources validates location, budget, capacity, restrictions
- [ ] Atomic upsert inventory + deduct doubloons + reduce capacity
- [ ] Creates Transaction records
- [ ] Returns specific error messages
- [ ] API route wires up correctly

**Verify:** `curl -X POST localhost:3000/api/game/purchase`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/game-actions.ts", "src/app/api/game/purchase/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "curl -X POST localhost:3000/api/game/purchase", "acceptanceCriteria": ["purchaseResources validates location, budget, capacity, restrictions", "Atomic upsert inventory + deduct doubloons + reduce capacity", "Creates Transaction records", "Returns specific error messages", "API route wires up correctly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Day Progression & Timer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement day advance, timer controls, and day-end processing.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/lib/game-actions.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/game/advance-day/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/game/end-day/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/game/timer/pause/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/game/timer/resume/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/game/timer/extend/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] advanceDay increments day and sets timer
- [ ] endDay processes stay-in-place consumption
- [ ] Treasure Island awards chests
- [ ] Timer pause/resume/extend work correctly
- [ ] Day 25 auto-triggers game end
- [ ] All API routes work

**Verify:** `curl -X POST localhost:3000/api/game/advance-day`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/game-actions.ts", "src/app/api/game/advance-day/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/end-day/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/timer/pause/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/timer/resume/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/timer/extend/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "curl -X POST localhost:3000/api/game/advance-day", "acceptanceCriteria": ["advanceDay increments day and sets timer", "endDay processes stay-in-place consumption", "Treasure Island awards chests", "Timer pause/resume/extend work correctly", "Day 25 auto-triggers game end", "All API routes work"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Movement & Socket.io Wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Handle submit-move Socket.io event — validate movement, calculate consumption, apply storm/lost/stranded logic, broadcast results.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/lib/game-actions.ts`
- Modify: `server.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] submit-move validates and processes movement
- [ ] Adjacency, lost status, already-moved checks
- [ ] Consumption based on weather at destination
- [ ] Storm protection priority chain
- [ ] Lost 3-day auto-resolve
- [ ] Stranding on insufficient resources
- [ ] Socket.io events emitted correctly
- [ ] Timer auto-triggers endDay

**Verify:** Start game, advance day, emit submit-move -> receive move-confirmed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/game-actions.ts", "server.ts"], "verifyCommand": "manual Socket.io test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["submit-move validates and processes movement", "Adjacency, lost status, already-moved checks", "Consumption based on weather at destination", "Storm protection priority chain", "Lost 3-day auto-resolve", "Stranding on insufficient resources", "Socket.io events emitted correctly", "Timer auto-triggers endDay"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Scoring & End Game
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement scoring logic, game end processing, and CSV export.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/scoring.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/__tests__/scoring.test.ts`
- Modify: `src/lib/game-actions.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/game/end/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Home Port teams score = treasure count
- [ ] Non-Home Port = SHIPWRECKED score 0
- [ ] STRANDED = score 0
- [ ] Tiebreaker by return day
- [ ] CSV export works
- [ ] POST /api/game/end works

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/lib/__tests__/scoring.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/scoring.ts", "src/lib/__tests__/scoring.test.ts", "src/lib/game-actions.ts", "src/app/api/game/end/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/lib/__tests__/scoring.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Home Port teams score = treasure count", "Non-Home Port = SHIPWRECKED score 0", "STRANDED = score 0", "Tiebreaker by return day", "CSV export works", "POST /api/game/end works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Game UI Components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create BuyPanel, DayTimer, WeatherDisplay, DayControls, Scoreboard, StrandedOverlay.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/game/BuyPanel.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/game/DayTimer.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/game/WeatherDisplay.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/game/DayControls.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] BuyPanel renders with +/- and confirm
- [ ] DayTimer countdown synced
- [ ] WeatherDisplay team vs facilitator mode
- [ ] DayControls all buttons work
- [ ] Scoreboard with ranks and CSV
- [ ] StrandedOverlay full screen

**Verify:** `npx next build`

tasks.subject: Task 8: Socket.io Event Broadcasting from API Routes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ensure all API route actions broadcast Socket.io events to connected clients.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/io.ts`
- Modify all 7 API routes under `src/app/api/game/`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] purchase-confirmed broadcast
- [ ] day-advanced broadcast
- [ ] day-ended broadcast
- [ ] timer events broadcast
- [ ] game-ended broadcast
- [ ] Uses global __io instance

**Verify:** Facilitator advances day -> team receives weather

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/io.ts", "src/app/api/game/purchase/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/advance-day/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/end-day/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/end/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/timer/pause/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/timer/resume/route.ts", "src/app/api/game/timer/extend/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "manual Socket.io test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["purchase-confirmed broadcast", "day-advanced broadcast", "day-ended broadcast", "timer events broadcast", "game-ended broadcast", "Uses global __io instance"]}
```
